title: CPTPP: joint ministerial statement in Jeju, 16 May 2025
body: "CPTPP members discussed:   the challenging international trading environment the 3 overarching priorities for 2025 under the theme, Delivering Sustainable Trade and Resilient Growth continued progress on the General Review the importance of the continued expansion of CPTPP  future trade and investment initiatives with the European Union (EU) and Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN)   "
